name: imsg-mcp
description: iMessage / SMS MCP for macOS — read, search, send, attach.
long_description: Read chat.db, send iMessage/SMS via AppleScript with auto-fallback, search messages with fuzzy + literal modes, fetch attachments (HEIC→PNG auto-conversion), browse via MCP Resources, run analytics, and search/list/resolve contacts — all from your Mac. End-user data never leaves the device.

imsg_db_path.title: iMessage chat.db path
imsg_db_path.description: Override the default ~/Library/Messages/chat.db. Leave empty for default.

contacts_db_path.title: AddressBook DB path
contacts_db_path.description: Override the default AddressBook-v22.abcddb path. Leave empty for default.
